ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game occurred */,
  "team_1" INTEGER /* Identifier for the first team */,
  "team_2" INTEGER /* Identifier for the second team */,
  "home" INTEGER /* Indicates if the first team was the home team (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "score_1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the first team won (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, in progress, postponed) */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistical entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game ID from the games table */,
  "seed_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in seed ranking between the two teams */,
  "score_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in score between the two teams */,
  "team_1_points_1q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 1 in the first quarter */,
  "team_2_points_1q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 2 in the first quarter */,
  "team_1_points_2q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 1 in the second quarter */,
  "team_2_points_2q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 2 in the second quarter */,
  "team_1_points_3q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 1 in the third quarter */,
  "team_2_points_3q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 2 in the third quarter */,
  "team_1_points_4q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 1 in the fourth quarter */,
  "team_2_points_4q" INTEGER /* Points scored by team 2 in the fourth quarter */,
  "team_1_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by team 1 */,
  "team_2_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by team 2 */,
  "team_1_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by team 1 */,
  "team_2_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by team 2 */,
  "team_1_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by team 1 */,
  "team_2_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by team 2 */,
  "team_1_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls by team 1 */,
  "team_2_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls by team 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game ID from the games table */,
  "predicted_outcome" REAL /* Predicted outcome score based on the model */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
